channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Router brands could be misleading you with that Wi-Fi 7 label
item.description: Wi-Fi standards remain as confusing as ever.

item.title: En promo à moins de 800 € : faut-il craquer pour la référence Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 ou l’outsider Motorola Razr 70 ?
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 et le Motorola Razr 70 profitent d'une belle baisse de prix pendant les soldes. L'occasion idéale de s'offrir un smartphone au format clapet sans se ruiner. Mais entre ces deux rivaux, lequel faut-il choisir ?

item.title: The square-ish phone that I wanted to love
item.description: The Ikko MindOne Pro is delightfully small. I keep calling it a square phone, which isn't quite right; the screen is square, but the phone itself is slightly rectangular. The camera flips up so you can use it for selfies - you can even open it partway to use as a stand or a kind […]

item.title: Dutton Ranch season 2: everything we know so far about the Yellowstone spinoff's return, including if Taylor Sheridan will be showrunner
item.description: Dutton Ranch season 2 was renewed ahead of the season 1 finale. Here's what we know about the Yellowstone spinoff's return so far.

item.title: Portable USB DVD writer compatible with Android and iPhone sees 50% price cut to $39 — ODD reads/writes CDs at 24X, DVDs at 8X
item.description: This nine-in-one CD/DVD drive connects to your smartphone, tablet or laptop via USB-A or USB-C, offers USB and SD expansion ports too.

item.title: Avengers: Secret Wars — release date, likely cast, and everything else we know about the exciting new Marvel movie
item.description: Avengers: Secret Wars will bring the wildly inconsistent Marvel Multiverse Saga to a close — here's what we know about it so far.

item.title: The best tech of 2026 so far —the 21 finest gadgets we've tested this year
item.description: TechRadar has spent days testing 639 products across phones, TVs, laptops, cameras, smartwatches and more in 2026. These are the best ones we've reviewed so far this year.

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs England: FREE streams, TV channels for Nations Championship 2026 game
item.description: All the ways to watch South Africa vs England live streams – including for FREE – for the Nations Championship 2026 game at Ellis Park.

item.title: Google Maps may soon be able to replace Uber Eats and DoorDash by letting you order food from restaurants right in the app
item.description: Code found hidden in the latest version of Google Maps for Android points to an AI-powered food ordering system.

item.title: On a testé le Moustache Dimanche 29 Gravel 2 Flat Bar : le vélo gravel électrique civilisé qui marie avec brio ville et chemins
item.description: Habile en ville comme sur les chemins, le VAE gravel Moustache Dimanche 29 brille dans sa version « flat bar » avec un confort très correct et de bonnes performances, tout en ajoutant l’écosystème Bosch réputé.

item.title: Vous cherchez un climatiseur ? Évitez à tout prix ces modèles, ce sont des arnaques
item.description: Des climatiseurs présentés comme « révolutionnaires », faciles à installer, et censés offrir des performances exceptionnelles envahissent Internet depuis le début de l’été. Il s'agit tout simplement d'arnaques. Soit l'appareil ne produit pas de froid, soit il n'est jamais livré. Plusieurs indices permettent de repérer cette arnaque.

item.title: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
item.description: Over the past week, a new fanworks movement has kicked off, with the aim to root out authors using generative AI. But the detection methods being implemented are questionable, and any fanfic writer could be caught in the crossfire. Broad distaste around the use of Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI tools has long been a […]

item.title: The new Blink Outdoor 2K+ is a sharper budget camera to protect your property, with one frustrating catch
item.description: The latest iteration of Amazon's tough little cam offers very impressive battery life, but its Sync Module Core no longer allows you to connect USB storage.

item.title: How to build a Steam Machine-killing compact gaming PC for less
item.description: We show you how to build a Steam Machine-killing small-form-factor gaming PC for the same price (or less) than Valve's upcoming rig.

item.title: Im watching the British GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the British GP in the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.
